chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Misc. Appl. No.582 of 2023 (Prof. Syed Muhammad Ahsan Iqbal Zaidi v. IIIrd Additional District & Sessions Judge Central Karachi and 05 others) __________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection at A 2. For hearing of main case 25.04.2024 Applicant in person Respondent No.3 in person Mr. Irshad Ali, Assistant Attorney General SI Farhad Ali I/O FIA Cyber Crime and SIP Ghulam Qadir PS Taimoria ========= The facts in brief necessary for disposal of instant Crl. Misc. application under Section 561-A are that an application under Section 22-A/B Cr.PC was filed by the applicant seeking directions against the police to record his statement for purpose of FIR; it was dismissed for non-prosecution on account of his failure to attend the learned trial Court; an application for recalling of such dismissal order was filed by him; it was also dismissed for non-prosecution by learned III- Additional Sessions Judge Karachi Central vide order dated 07.06.2023, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application. No application which is dismissed for non- prosecution could legally be restored in criminal proceedings. The applicant however subject to law repeat the same before the learned trial Court. No further order on the instant Crl. Misc. Application is called for, it is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Nadir*
